creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: SCSI target can report only 2 values, logical and physical, should be 512 and 8K here.  Linux kernel by its current design can not handle logical blocks above 4096.  But don't ask me why it reports as a block size here, ask somebody there.  My responsibility ends at `sg_readcap --16 /dev/sdb` output, which should return proper values.
